content_body:
Located in Blue Ridge, GA in the North Georgia's mountains our luxury hand-picked cabins offer fireplaces, hot tubs, game rooms, and easy access to twinkling lights, scenic train rides, and holiday shopping on Main Street in Downtown Blue Ridge. Book your winter escape today!

Why Blue Ridge for the Holidays?


Skyfall

  • Cozy by the Fire: Imagine curling up by the warm glow of a wood-burning or gas-log fireplace, the gentle crackle and flicker casting a golden light across your mountain retreat. Every one of our cabins in Blue Ridge is thoughtfully equipped with this inviting centerpiece, crafting the perfect ambience for a serene holiday escape.

    Gaze out at breathtaking panoramic mountain vistas or lose yourself in the tranquil whisper of surrounding evergreens, whichever view calls to you. And when it's time to gather, our fully stocked kitchens make holiday feasting effortless, from roasting chestnuts to baking family-favorite pies, all while the fire keeps the chill at bay. This will become a heartwarming tradition you'll return to year after year.

  • Festive Adventures Await: Step out from your cozy cabin into a whirlwind of holiday enchantment, where Blue Ridge transforms into a twinkling North Georgia fairytale. Wander the dazzling streets during the Light Up Blue Ridge parade and tree lighting (November 28–29, 2025), then hop aboard the Holiday Express Train for a merry ride along the Toccoa River, complete with Santa's bells and candy canes (running through December 24).

    Savor gingerbread masterpieces at the Village display (December 1–21) or glide across the rink at Blue Ridge on Ice (open until January 6, 2026). Each moment brimming with lights, laughter, and the magic of traditions makes the season unforgettable. 

  • New Year's Sparkle: As the clock strikes midnight on December 31, 2025, trade the chill of the mountains for an explosion of color and cheer at the Georgia Mountain Fairgrounds, where a spectacular fireworks display lights up the sky at 8pm, ushering in 2026 with vibrant bursts and the scent of festive food trucks from 6pm onward. 

    Or, elevate your toast with an elegant wine and dessert excursion aboard the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway's New Year's Eve special, gliding through starlit valleys with sips of local vintages and decadent treats, all while the Toccoa River whispers below. From your cabin's doorstep, these sparkling send-offs blend thrill and romance, turning resolutions into radiant memories. Book now and let the new year dawn in unforgettable glow.

Featured Holiday Cabins: 

"Charming home with amazing views of the mountains and nestled away from civilization. The warm interiors were balanced by the openness of the windows on the west side of the house. We enjoyed sitting on the balcony and really appreciated the holiday decorations as we celebrated Christmas as a family. We will definitely be back again as this cabin has everything you need and is just as advertised." ~ Cohutta Sunset

"We rented the Serendipity On Noontootla Creek. There were ten of us and our stay was over the holidays. We decided to spend the money and make some memories! We arrived to a spectacularly CLEAN home. Our fire wood was delivered and we made the best memories! The property was so beautiful and nicely kept! We are going to go back over the summer!" ~ Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

My family and I had a wonderful stay at your cabin. It was VERY well equipped and we appreciated all the little touches. The kitchen was stocked wth everything we needed. Our week here has been so relaxing and peaceful - we are really sad  to be leaving tomorrow. Playing pool, checkers, watching TV by the fireplace, watching the train go by, taking walks along the road, star gazing... it all made for a wonderful Christmas getaway. My kids are older teens so staying at the cabin most days was just fine for them (and us!). :) We can't thank you enough for all the thought put into making sure we had everything we needed - even a Christmas tree! We had a great time here!!  ~Fallen Timber Lodge

Book Your Holiday Stay Today

With limited availability, make sure to reserve your perfect Blue Ridge luxury cabin in advance! For more information on recommended activities, check out our Christmas guide or our Winter Things to Do in Blue Ridge.
title: Christmas & New Year’s Cabin Rentals in Blue Ridge, GA
